headline: French Revolution
description: The French Revolution (1789-1799) overthrew the monarchy, established a republic, and fundamentally transformed French society and European politics. Ideals: Liberty, Equality, Fraternity. Marked the rise of modern nationalism, secularism, and the concept of universal human rights.
